title: Verify loss aversion message displays when user attempts to cancel
description: Test that clicking cancel triggers the loss aversion intervention with warning about losing remaining days
preconditions: User is on Trial Corner page
expected_result: Loss aversion pop-up appears with headline 'Wait! Don't lose your free days', body text about losing remaining days, 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder' as primary action, and 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access' as secondary action
